research.sdxl.derivative.license_hint: Verify the upstream license and model card before use.
research.sdxl.derivative.notes: Example entry for an SDXL-compatible checkpoint discovered manually.

research.sd15.derivative.license_hint: Verify the upstream license and model card before use.
research.sd15.derivative.notes: Example entry for an SD 1.5 style checkpoint.

research.sd21.derivative.license_hint: Verify the upstream license and model card before use.
research.sd21.derivative.notes: Example entry for an SD 2.x style checkpoint.

research.pixart.alpha.variant.license_hint: Verify the upstream license and model card before use.
research.pixart.alpha.variant.notes: Example entry for a PixArt Alpha compatible model.

research.pixart.sigma.variant.license_hint: Verify the upstream license and model card before use.
research.pixart.sigma.variant.notes: Example entry for a PixArt Sigma compatible model.

research.sd3.variant.license_hint: Verify the upstream license, gating and model card before use.
research.sd3.variant.notes: Example entry for a Stable Diffusion 3 compatible model.

research.flux.variant.license_hint: Verify the upstream license, gating and model card before use.
research.flux.variant.notes: Example entry for a FLUX-compatible model. Requires environment support for FluxPipeline.

local.sdxl.dir.example.license_hint: Verify the creator license and terms before use.
local.sdxl.dir.example.notes: Example local directory source. Prefer this when you have a full diffusers-compatible folder.

local.sdxl.file.example.license_hint: Verify the creator license and terms before use.
local.sdxl.file.example.notes: Example local single-file source. A .safetensors checkpoint can work when the pipeline supports from_single_file().
